statement.markdown:
## Statement: Create a Spring Animation using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
### Requirements
Create a spring animation using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
The spring animation should have a ball bouncing in an elastic manner.
The ball should start from the top center of the page and bounce back up to the top.
The animation should be smooth and have a natural bounce effect.
The code should be well-structured and readable.

gradingCriteria.description: The animation should be smooth and natural
The ball should bounce back up to the top
The ball should start from the top center of the page
The code should be well-structured and readable
